projection_payload.description: Normalizes scanned or OCR-derived nonfiction book pages into page title, work title, chapter and section headings, body prose and page metadata for chapter-aware authored-text workflows.
projection_payload.label: Authored book page

routing.avoid_when: Avoid for journals, academic papers dominated by citation apparatus, transactional records, forms, tabular layouts or document families where the page is not a prose-oriented authored-text unit.

routing.when_to_use: Use for scanned, OCR-derived or extracted pages from authored nonfiction books or manuscripts where the page unit contains titles, chapter or section headings, page numbers and extended prose paragraphs.

projection_payload.description: Projection for page-level normalization of long-form prose book or manuscript pages about consciousness, dreams, symbolic interpretation, and related reflective nonfiction themes.
projection_payload.label: Humanities psychology book page

routing.avoid_when: Avoid for poetry, fiction, academic journal articles with formal citation structure, forms, tables, bibliographies, or transactional documents that are not page-level prose excerpts.
routing.when_to_use: Use for scanned, OCR'd, or text-derived pages from a longer prose book or manuscript where the main payload is continuous reflective or philosophical writing about consciousness, mind, dreams, altered states, symbolism, or archetypal interpretation, often with visible chapter or section headings.
